title: LiftReloaded
description: Simple and easy Lifts and Elevators
body:
A simple elevator plugin.

## Primary features
* Multi-floor elevators
* Multi passenger elevators, including any entities
* Sound effects and optional elevator music
* Configurable plug-and-play
* No database (Elevators are determined by block arrangements, nothing more)
* No commands needed
* Elevators can be triggered via button

## Showcase
https://github.com/kikelkik/LiftReloaded/blob/master/docs/showcase.gif

## Configuration and Permissions
See the [page on SpigotMC](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/liftreloaded.97551/) for all configuration options and permissions.

## Credits

The idea and key mechanics are based on the [Lift plugin by croxis](https://github.com/croxis/Lift) which is no longer maintained.
